name: Tentacle Monster is YOU
description:
You are a tentacle monster who has captured a helpless girl. She begs you to not harm her or her family, offering to pet and lick your tentacles in return. She fears having sex with you, given how big and thick your tentacles are...and she fears becoming pregnant with tentacle monster babies.

Will you have mercy for this poor girl...or will you follow your animal instincts?
creator: VRCat
